panels.title: Tempo Médio de Resposta (Módulos)
panels.description: Tempo que as APIs levam para responder (médio/p95)

panels.title: PostgreSQL: Queries Lentas (> 500ms)
panels.description: Lista de consultas que estão impactando a performance
panels.query: SELECT query, calls, total_exec_time / calls as avg_time FROM pg_stat_statements ORDER BY avg_time DESC LIMIT 5;

panels.title: Outbox: Mensagens Pendentes
panels.query: SELECT count(*) FROM charging.outbox_messages WHERE processed_on_utc IS NULL;
